data.description: The c11 main menu bar has grown organically (notifications top-level menu, workspace submenu inside File, splits + browser nav + workspace switching + sidebar toggle all mixed inside View) and now reads as random and miscellaneous. Audit the current state of every item in c11 / File / Edit / View / Notifications / Window / Help, then redesign for legibility — group by user intent, surface c11-native concepts (panes, surfaces, workspaces, sidebar) at appropriate levels, and decide whether 'Notifications' should remain top-level or fold into View.
data.title: Reorganize macOS menu bar — reduce miscellany, group by intent

data.body: UX dialogue (2026-05-15) locked the proposal direction. Final decisions: hybrid taxonomy (macOS chrome + c11-native verbs); top-level shape = c11 / File / Edit / View / Workspace / Pane / Browser / Notifications / Window (Help removed); each primitive owns its New (File minimal, Workspace owns New Workspace, Pane owns Split + New Surface); Open Folder stays in File; View shrinks to Chrome + Appearance (theme controls promoted out of Debug); Find flat under Edit; Notifications stays top-level with View duplicates removed. Full proposal in .lattice/notes/task_01KRN2NCZRBFA07B7Q7G3M8P2J.md Part 2. Open follow-ups (not blocking): ⌘R conflict between Browser→Reload and Pane→Rename Tab; notifications unread badge in menu title; Close Tab vs Close Surface copy pass; Theme M1b graduation from Debug to View.

Final scope locked (2026-05-15 dialogue): all single-target close verbs (Close Tab, Close Workspace, Close Window) removed from File — GUI affordances + responder-chain shortcuts cover them. File menu = 3 items only (New Window, Open Folder…, Close Other Tabs in Pane). Tab Bar chrome feature removed entirely — TabBarChromeState enum, AppStorage key, cycleTabBarChromeState(), toggleTabBarChrome shortcut action, and Settings UI all deleted; one canonical style hardcoded (recommend Full). All work folded into this ticket as 6 buckets (A: menu rewrite, B: Appearance→View, C: Tab Bar feature removal, D: ⌘R rebind, E: Notifications unread badge via NSMenu, F: tests/localizations). ~3 days estimated. Three minor open questions remain in the notes: canonical tab-bar style, ⌘R rebind chord, notifications-badge implementation scope.
Plan locked. Delegating to a c11 surface for implementation in worktree .claude/worktrees/c11-41-menu-reorg (branch feat/c11-41-menu-reorg off main).

PR opened: https://github.com/Stage-11-Agentics/c11/pull/161. Single commit covers all five locked buckets — menu structure rewrite, Appearance promoted from Debug → View, Tab Bar feature deletion (canonical = Full), Rename Tab default rebound to ⌘⇧E (frees ⌘R for Browser Reload Page), tests updated (WorkspaceUnitTests for new default, AppDelegateShortcutRoutingTests Dvorak case pinned to legacy ⌘R via withTemporaryShortcut). Locally: c11 Debug build green, c11-unit build-for-testing green. CI E2E and the six-locale translation pass are deferred to PR review.

data.reason: PR #161 reviewed and approved inline by operator; merged to main as c86f19e73.

provenance.reason: PR #161 reviewed and approved inline by operator; merged to main as c86f19e73.

data.body: Merged to main as c86f19e73 (squash). PR #161 closed; feat/c11-41-menu-reorg branch deleted.
